miscfeatures.config.title: JulieISBaka Misc Features
miscfeatures.config.developer_mode.label: Developer mode
miscfeatures.config.developer_mode.toolt: When enabled, the maximum radius setting is no longer capped.
Reopen this screen after changing the toggle to refresh developer-only entries.
miscfeatures.config.verbose_logging.tool: Logs detailed misc-features command execution information.
Developer mode must be enabled for this setting to take effect.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_ar: When enabled, /anvil auto-inserts your main-hand armour piece into slot 1.
Only applies if the main hand item matches armour and slot 1 is empty.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_we: When enabled, /anvil auto-inserts your main-hand weapon or tool into slot 1.
Includes damageable tools/weapons, bows, crossbows, and tridents.
miscfeatures.config.anvil.auto_insert_na: When enabled, /anvil auto-inserts a main-hand name tag into slot 1.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.allow_negati: When enabled, enchant levels below zero are accepted.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.allow_high_l: When enabled, enchant levels above 255 are accepted as unsafe developer behavior.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.prevent_crea: Prevent creative packet crash on unsafe enchants
When enabled, negative and >255 enchants are blocked for creative targets to avoid known creative-slot packet crashes.
Disable this if you want fully unsafe behaviour and accept crash risk.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.fix_high_lev: Fixes enchant tooltip levels above 10 so they display readable text instead of raw translation keys.
miscfeatures.config.enchant.high_level_s: Use Roman style for levels above 10
Switches fixed high-level enchant display between numeric and Roman numerals.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_radius.to: Developer mode removes the UI cap for this setting, but the command is still capped by whatever value you configure here.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_radius.no: In normal mode this setting itself is capped at %s.
miscfeatures.config.search_unloaded_chun: When disabled, /find block skips blocks in chunks that are not already loaded.
When enabled, /find block may force chunk access beyond the currently loaded area.
When disabled, /find item skips containers in chunks that are not already loaded.
When enabled, /find item may force chunk access beyond the currently loaded area.
When disabled, /find entity only inspects entities in already loaded chunks.
When enabled, /find entity may load chunks in range before scanning entities.
miscfeatures.config.max_search_results.t: Limits how many /find block matches are printed per block or tag target.
The total count is still reported even when the printed list is truncated.
miscfeatures.config.max_item_search_radi: Developer mode removes the UI cap for this setting, but the command is still capped by whatever value you configure here.
In normal mode this setting itself is capped at %s.
miscfeatures.config.max_find_item_result: Limits how many container matches /find item prints per item or tag target.
The total item and container counts are still reported even when the printed list is truncated.
miscfeatures.config.max_entity_search_ra: Developer mode removes the UI cap for this setting, but entity searches still only operate on loaded entities in the current world.
Entity searches only operate on loaded entities in the current world.
miscfeatures.config.max_find_entity_resu: Limits how many entity matches /find entity prints per entity or tag target.
The total count is still reported even when the printed list is truncated.
